subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant of God and His mighty Testament! That which thou didst write was noted and understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی عهد الله و میثاقه العظیم آنچه مرقوم فرموده بودید معلوم و مفهوم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant
